KinematicDatum.Name: BGS2005
KinematicDatum.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ETRF2000 at epoch 2005.0

KinematicDatum.Name: CGCS2000
KinematicDatum.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF1997 at epoch 2000.0

KinematicDatum.Name: EST97
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: ETRF2000-Northern-Europe
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicDatum.Name: EUREF-DK15
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicDatum.Name: EUREF-DK94
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: EUREF-FIN
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: EUREF-NKG-2003
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: EUREF89
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: LKS-92
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicDatum.Name: OSNetv2001
KinematicDatum.DataSource: A Guide to Coordinate Systems in Great Britain V3.6 2020

KinematicDatum.Name: OSNetv2009
KinematicDatum.DataSource: A Guide to Coordinate Systems in Great Britain V3.6 2020

KinematicDatum.Name: SIR17P01
KinematicDatum.DataSource: Alias for SIRGAS-CON SIR17P01 (without displacement model for grid transformation)

KinematicDatum.Name: SIRGAS-AG
KinematicDatum.DataSource: Specific version of SIRGAS-CON, at epoch 2016, for Ag receivers

KinematicDatum.Name: SIRGAS2022
KinematicDatum.DataSource: Alias for SIRGAS-CON SIRGAS2022 (without displacement model for grid transformation)

KinematicDatum.Name: SWEREF99
KinematicDatum.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

DisplacementModel.Name: NKG-RF03 2019-07-01
DisplacementModel.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

DisplacementModel.Name: NKG-RF17 2022-06-01
DisplacementModel.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2000-Northern-Europe to EST97
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2000-Northern-Europe to EUREF-DK94
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2000-Northern-Europe to EUREF89
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2000-Northern-Europe to SWEREF99
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to EST97
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to EUREF-DK15
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to EUREF-FIN
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to EUREF-NKG-2003
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to EUREF89
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to LKS-92
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ETRF2014-Northern-Europe to SWEREF99
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33 - Updated with NKG-RF17

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF1996 to JGD2000
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Geospatial Information Authority of Japan - GSI

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF1997 to CGCS2000
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF1997 at epoch 2000.0

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2005 to SIRGAS-AG
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF2005 at epoch 2016, then moving with ITRF2005 SAOM Euler pole

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2005 to SIRGAS-CON
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF2005 at epoch 2005.0

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to ETRF2000-Northern-Europe
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Altamimi (2018) - Same ITRF2014 to ETRF2000 for Northern Europe Displacement Model

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to ETRF2014-Northern-Europe
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Altamimi (2018) - Same ITRF2014 to ETRF2014 for Northern Europe Displacement Model

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to ITRF2005_South_Africa
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF2014 to ITRF2005 from Altamimi (2018)

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to ITRF2008-India-CORS
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Altamimi (2018) - Same as ITRF2014 to ITRF2008 for Indian Displacement Model

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to ITRF2008-Korea
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Altamimi (2018) - Same as ITRF2014 to ITRF2008 for Korean Displacement Model

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to ITRF2008-Mexico
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Altamimi (2018) - Same as ITRF2014 to ITRF2008 for Mexican Displacement Model

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to PGD2020
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF2014 (NAMRIA STRATEGIC PLAN 2016-2020)

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to SIRGAS-CON SIR17P01
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: SIRGAS - Assumed equivelant to ITRF2014 at 2015.0

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014 to SIRGAS-CON SIRGAS2022
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: SIRGAS - Assumed equivelant to ITRF2014 at 2015.0

KinematicTransformation.Name: ITRF2014-TRIGNET to ITRF2005_South_Africa
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: Assumed equivalent to ITRF2014 to ITRF2005 from Altamimi (2018)

KinematicTransformation.Name: SIRGAS-CON SIR17P01 to SIR17P01
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: NULL transformation between original and alias

KinematicTransformation.Name: SIRGAS-CON SIRGAS2022 to SIRGAS-Ecuador
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: SIRGAS - Assumed same as ITRF2014 to ITRF2008

KinematicTransformation.Name: SIRGAS-CON SIRGAS2022 to SIRGAS2022
KinematicTransformation.DataSource: NULL transformation between original and alias

DataSource.Name: A Guide to Coordinate Systems in Great Britain V3.6 2020
DataSource.Author: Ordnance Survey
DataSource.Title: A Guide to Coordinate Systems in Great Britain
DataSource.Comment: An introduction to mapping coordinate systems and the use of GNSS datasets with Ordnance Survey mapping

DataSource.Name: AGRS Website - NSGI
DataSource.Author: NSGI
DataSource.Title: The Active GNSS Reference System (AGRS)

DataSource.Name: Al-Kherayef and Grebenitcharsky (2019)
DataSource.Author: O. Al-Kherayef and R. Grebenitcharsky
DataSource.Title: The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia Geodetic and Vertical Reference Frames

DataSource.Name: Altamimi (2018)
DataSource.Author: Zuheir Altamimi
DataSource.Title: EUREF Technical Note 1: Relationship and Transformation between the International and the European Terrestrial Reference Systems

DataSource.Name: Altamimi et al (2011)
DataSource.Author: Z. Altamimi, X. Collilieux and L. Metivier
DataSource.Title: ITRF2008: an improved solution of the international terrestrial reference frame

DataSource.Name: BIG
DataSource.Author: Badan Informasi Geospasial
DataSource.Title: SISTEM REFERENSI GEOSPASIAL INDONESIA 2013

DataSource.Name: Baroni et al. (2009)
DataSource.Author: Baroni L., F. Cauli, G. Farolfi, R. Maseroli - IGMI
DataSource.Title: Final results of the Italian “Rete Dinamica Nazionale” (RDN) of Istituto Geografico Militare Italiano (IGMI) and its alignment to ETRF2000

DataSource.Name: Berk (2018)
DataSource.Author: Sandi Berk, Oskar Sterle, Klemen Medved, Zarko Komadina, Bojan Stopar
DataSource.Title: Computation of the EUREF Slovenia 2016 GNSS Campaign

DataSource.Name: Bock, Fang and Helmer (2018)
DataSource.Author: Yehuda Bock, Peng Fang and Gregory R. Helmer
DataSource.Title: PROJECT REPORT California Spatial Reference System CSRS Epoch 2017.50 (NAD83)

DataSource.Name: Bock, Fang, Helmer and Soza (2025)
DataSource.Author: Yehuda Bock, Peng Fang, Gregory A. Helmer and Lavoisiane Souza
DataSource.Title: CSRN Epoch 2025.00 NAD83(2011)

DataSource.Name: Boucher and Altamimi (2011)
DataSource.Author: Claude Boucher and Zuheir Altamimi
DataSource.Title: Memo: Specifications for reference frame fixing in the analysis of a EUREF GPS campaign (Version 8 : 18-05-2011)

DataSource.Name: Craymer (2006)
DataSource.Author: Michael R. Craymer
DataSource.Title: The Evolution of NAD83 in Canada

DataSource.Name: Dawson and Woods (2010)
DataSource.Author: John Dawson and Alex Woods
DataSource.Title: ITRF to GDA94 coordinate transformations
DataSource.Comment: Sign was changed for Rx, Ry and Rz (sign of the rotations and their rates are inversed in Australia, due to difference in formulas)

DataSource.Name: Donnelly et al. (2014)
DataSource.Author: N. Donnelly, C. Crook, J. Haasdyk, C. Harrison, C.Rizos, C. Roberts and R. Stanaway
DataSource.Title: Dynamic Datum Transformations in Australia and New Zealand

DataSource.Name: EUREF v1
DataSource.Author: Z. Altamimi
DataSource.Title: EUREF Technical Note 1: Relationship and Transformation between the International and the European Terrestrial Reference Systems

DataSource.Name: Figueroa, Amaya and Sánchez (2009)
DataSource.Author: C.E. Figueroa, W. Amaya and L. Sánchez
DataSource.Title: Integration of the reference frame of El Salvador into SIRGAS (SIRGAS-ES2007.8)

DataSource.Name: Freitag (2020)
DataSource.Author: M.Freitag
DataSource.Title: M.Freitag data (Bavaria)
DataSource.Comment: Provided by Sara Brakemeier as data used in Trimble software from SAPOS Lower Saxony

DataSource.Name: GDA2020 Technical Manual v1.5
DataSource.Author: Intergovernmental Committee on Surveying and Mapping (ICSM Australia)
DataSource.Title: Geocentric Datum of Australia 2020 Technical Manual
DataSource.Comment: Sign was changed for Rx, Ry and Rz (sign of the rotations and their rates are inversed in Australia, due to difference in formulas)

DataSource.Name: HTDP version 3.2.9
DataSource.Author: NGS
DataSource.Title: HTDP – Horizontal Time-Dependent Positioning - version 3.2.9

DataSource.Name: HTDP version 3.4.0
DataSource.Author: NGS
DataSource.Title: HTDP – Horizontal Time-Dependent Positioning - version 3.4.0

DataSource.Name: INEGI (2021)
DataSource.Author: INEGI
DataSource.Title: Red Geodésica Nacional Activa

DataSource.Name: ISOGR
DataSource.Author: ISO
DataSource.Title: ISO Geodetic Registry (ISOGR)

DataSource.Name: ITRF Website - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: Transformation parameters

DataSource.Name: ITRF2005 plate motion model
DataSource.Author: Zuheir Altamimi, Juliette Legrand
DataSource.Title: ITRF2005 Plate Motion Model: A Sensitivity Analysis

DataSource.Name: ITRF2008 plate motion model
DataSource.Author: Z. Altamimi L. Métivier X. Collilieux
DataSource.Title: ITRF2008 plate motion model

DataSource.Name: ITRF2014 plate motion model
DataSource.Author: Zuheir Altamimi, Laurent Métivier, Paul Rebischung, Hélène Rouby, Xavier Collilieux
DataSource.Title: ITRF2014 plate motion model

DataSource.Name: JGD2000 - GSI
DataSource.Author: GSI
DataSource.Title: The New Geodetic Reference System of Japan - Its adoption and application to our products
DataSource.Comment: Equivalent to ITRF94 at epoch 1997.0

DataSource.Name: JGD2011 - GSI
DataSource.Author: GSI
DataSource.Title: Revision of the Results of Control Points after the 2011 off the Pacific coast of Tohoku Earthquake
DataSource.Comment: Equivalent to ITRF2008 at epoch 2011.395 (2011-05-24, 12:00 UTC) in Northern Honshu area. Equivalent to JGD2000 elsewhere.

DataSource.Name: Jade et al (2017)
DataSource.Author: Claude Boucher and Zuheir Altamimi
DataSource.Title: India plate angular velocity and contemporary deformation rates from continuous GPS measurements from 1996 to 2015

DataSource.Name: KGD2002 - PCGIAP
DataSource.Author: Permanent Committee for GIS Infrastructure for Asia and the Pacific (PCGIAP)
DataSource.Comment: KGD2002 is assumed equivalent to ITRF2000 at epoch 2002.0

DataSource.Name: Kim and Bae (2017)
DataSource.Author: Su-Kyung Kim and Tae-Suk Bae
DataSource.Title: Long-Term GNSS Analysis for Local Geodetic Datum After 2011 Tohoku Earthquake
DataSource.Comment: 14 parameters between ITRF2008-Korea and KGD2002 were retrieved from page 130, assuming that KGD2015B is equivalent to ITRF2008 after Tohoku Earthquake Parameters are really translations those from KGD2002 to KGD2015B = ITRF2008, so we shall inverse signs

DataSource.Name: Kim and Ree (2017)
DataSource.Author: Sungshil Kim, Jin‐Han Ree, Ha Su Yoon, Byung‐Kyu Choi, Pil‐Ho Park
DataSource.Title: Crustal Deformation of South Korea After the Tohoku‐Oki Earthquake

DataSource.Name: LINZ (2017)
DataSource.Author: LINZ
DataSource.Title: Transforming between ITRF and NZGD2000 9 May 2017

DataSource.Name: MAGNA-SIRGAS - IGAC
DataSource.Author: IGAC
DataSource.Title: Aspectos prácticos de la adopción del Marco Geocéntrico Nacional de Referencia MAGNA-SIRGAS como datum oficial de Colombia
DataSource.Comment: Densification of SIRGAS95 (ITRF94 at epoch 1995.4) in Colombia

DataSource.Name: MYCS1 - NGS
DataSource.Author: NGS
DataSource.Title: Multi-Year CORS Solution 1 (MYCS1)
DataSource.Comment: Sign was changed for Rx, Ry and Rz (sign of the rotations and their rates are inversed in US, due to difference in formulas)

DataSource.Name: MYCS2 - NGS
DataSource.Author: NGS
DataSource.Title: Multi-Year CORS Solution 2 (MYCS2)
DataSource.Comment: Sign was changed for Rx, Ry and Rz (sign of the rotations and their rates are inversed in US, due to difference in formulas)

DataSource.Name: Malservisi et al (2013)
DataSource.Author: Malservisi, Rocco & Hugentobler, Urs & Wonnacott, Richard & Hackl, M..
DataSource.Title: How rigid is a rigid plate? Geodetic constraint from the TrigNet CGPS network, South Africa. Geophysical Journal International. 192. 918-928. 10.1093/gji/ggs081.

DataSource.Name: NA83(2011/PA11/MA11) - NGS
DataSource.Author: NGS
DataSource.Title: Publication of North American Datum of 1983 (2011) Epoch 2010.00, North American Datum of 1983 (PA2011) Epoch 2010.00 and North American Datum of 1983 (MA2011) Epoch 2010.00

DataSource.Name: NAD83(CSRS)v7 - NRCan
DataSource.Author: Natural Resources Canada
DataSource.Title: NAD83(CSRS) v7

DataSource.Name: NAD83(CSRS)v8 - NRCan
DataSource.Author: Natural Resources Canada
DataSource.Title: NAD83(CSRS) v8 (November 2024)

DataSource.Name: NAMRIA STRATEGIC PLAN 2016-2020
DataSource.Author: Geodesy division NAMRIA
DataSource.Title: Modernization of the PHILIPPINE GEODETIC REFERENCE SYSTEM

DataSource.Name: NGA WGS84(G2296)
DataSource.Author: National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency NGA
DataSource.Title: WGS 84 (G2296) Terrestrial Reference Frame Realization

DataSource.Name: NNR-MORVEL56 plate motion model
DataSource.Author: C. DeMets, D. Argus and R. Gordon
DataSource.Title: MORVEL and NNR-MORVEL56 plate velocity estimates and information

DataSource.Name: NNR-NUVEL-1A plate motion model
DataSource.Author: Shuanggen Jin, Wenyao Zhu
DataSource.Title: A revision of the parameters of the NNR-NUVEL-1A plate velocity model

DataSource.Name: NTIG_CR01_06.2023
DataSource.Author: Instituto Geográfico Nacional/Registro Nacional
DataSource.Title: Sistema de Referencia Geodésico de Costa Rica - Versión 2

DataSource.Name: OSGoF Nigeria
DataSource.Author: Ogochukwu Izuegbu
DataSource.Title: Meeting with Ogochukwu Izuegbu (OSGoF Nigeria) at FIG Working Week 2024 in Ghana

DataSource.Name: P Hakli et al J. Geod. Sci. 2016; 6:1–33
DataSource.Author: P. Häkli, M. Lidberg, L. Jivall, T. Nørbech, O. Tangen, M. Weber, P. Pihlak, I. Aleksejenko, and E. Paršeliunas
DataSource.Title: The NKG2008 GPS campaign – final transformation results and a new common Nordic reference frame

DataSource.Name: PARAMETRY ZEMLI 1990 (PZ-90.11)
DataSource.Author: MILITARY TOPOGRAPHIC DEPARTMENT OF THE GENERAL STAFF OF ARMED FORCES OF THE RUSSIAN FEDERATION
DataSource.Title: PARAMETRY ZEMLI 1990 (PZ-90.11) Reference Document

DataSource.Name: POSGAR Website - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: Documentación técnica
DataSource.Comment: POSGAR07 is assumed equivalent to ITRF2005 at epoch 2007.274

DataSource.Name: Pearson and Snay (2013)
DataSource.Author: Chris Pearson and Richard Snay
DataSource.Title: Introducing HTDP 3.1 to transform coordinates across time and spatial reference frames

DataSource.Name: Pearson and Snay (2016)
DataSource.Author: Richard A. Snay, Jeffrey T. Freymueller, Michael R. Craymer, Chris F. Pearson, Jarir Saleh
DataSource.Title: Modeling 3-D crustal velocities in the United States and Canada
DataSource.Comment: Adapted by Chris Perason for NSRS2022 alpha1

DataSource.Name: RGAF09 - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: La géodésie des Antilles Françaises
DataSource.Comment: RGAF09 is assumed equivalent to ITRF2005 at epoch 2009.0

DataSource.Name: RGF93 - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: Le RGF93 | Géodésie
DataSource.Comment: RGF93v1 is assumed equivalent to ETRF1993 at epoch 1993.0 RGF93v2 is assumed equivalent to ETRF2000 at epoch 2009.0 RGF93v2b is assumed equivalent to ETRF2000 at epoch 2019.0

DataSource.Name: RGFG95 - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: Systèmes de Référence de Coordonnées usités en France
DataSource.Comment: RGFG95 is assumed equivalent to ITRF1993 at epoch 1995.0

DataSource.Name: RGNC91-93 - DITT
DataSource.Author: DITT
DataSource.Title: Les référentiels de Nouvelle-Calédonie | Direction des infrastructures, de la topographie et des transports terrestres
DataSource.Comment: RGNC91-93 is assumed equivalent to ITRF1990 at epoch 1989.0

DataSource.Name: RGR92 - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: Systèmes de Référence de Coordonnées usités en France
DataSource.Comment: RGR92 is assumed equivalent to ITRF1991 at epoch 1993.0

DataSource.Name: RGTAAF07 - IGN
DataSource.Author: IGN
DataSource.Title: Systèmes de Référence de Coordonnées usités en France
DataSource.Comment: RGTAAF07 is assumed equivalent to ITRF2005 at epoch 2007.274

DataSource.Name: SAPOS (2025)
DataSource.Author: SAPOS
DataSource.Title: RSN-Monitoring official transformation parameters

DataSource.Name: SIRGAS
DataSource.Author: SIRGAS
DataSource.Title: Sistema de Referencia Geocéntrico para las Américas (SIRGAS)

DataSource.Name: Sanchez & Drewes (2016)
DataSource.Author: L Sanchez - Deutsches Geodatisches Forschungsinstitut der Technischen Universitat Manchen
DataSource.Title: Crustal deformation and surface kinematics after the 2010 earthquakes in Latin America - Journal of Geodynamics

DataSource.Name: Sanchez and Drewes (2016)
DataSource.Author: L Sanchez - Deutsches Geodatisches Forschungsinstitut der Technischen Universitat Manchen
DataSource.Title: Crustal deformation and surface kinematics after the 2010 earthquakes in Latin America - Journal of Geodynamics

DataSource.Name: Sanchez, Drewes, Kehm and Seitz (2022)
DataSource.Author: Laura Sanchez, Hermann Drewes, Alexander Kehm and Manuela Seitz
DataSource.Title: SIRGAS reference frame analysis at DGFI–TUM - Journal of Geodetic Science

DataSource.Name: Snay and Soler (2008)
DataSource.Author: Richard Snay and Tomas Soler
DataSource.Title: Continuously Operating Reference Station (CORS): History, Applications, and Future Enhancements

DataSource.Name: TAP
DataSource.Author: Trimble
